notes.part_a_finding: VALIDATOR BUG (B). flag-unflag-post.mdx:796 is inside a real TypeScript fenced code block (```typescript at col 4, i.e. indented 4 spaces inside a <Tab> component). FENCE_RE = re.compile(r'^```...', re.MULTILINE) requires backticks at column 0. The ^-anchor with MULTILINE only matches start-of-line, so any block with leading whitespace before the triple-backtick is silently skipped. This is why delta=0 — the validator never scanned the block at all.
notes.fix_applied: Replaced `PostRepository.deletePost(postId)` with `PostRepository.softDeletePost(postId)` at flag-unflag-post.mdx:796 (case 'remove': context in ModerationDashboard.takeAction method). Consistent with 0085 pattern.
